text: Good evening. My name is Jacob. So I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Georgia State Relief Program. So have you been notified about these benefits yet? Yes, so I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
